claim_a.quote: In the Maldives, we are grappling with high debt burdens. Uncertainties in the global market and unfavourable market conditions remains a challenge to refinance our debt obligations.

claim_b.quote: the Maldives faces no concerns regarding the repayment of its external debt

notes: Real CONTRADICTION from live corpus (contradiction_pair #36, conf=0.78).
verification_notes: Verified 2026-05-21: Jan 2024 explicitly cites 'challenge to refinance debt obligations'; Mar 2026 explicitly claims 'no concerns repaying external debt'. Same subject (Maldives), same topic (external debt repayment), direct contradiction.
